synthesis_text: The most common symptoms of COVID-19 include fever [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001], cough [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011], loss of smell [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001], loss of taste [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001], headache [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011], muscle pain [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011], fatigue [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00001], and breathing difficulties [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011]. These symptoms can vary in severity and may change over time [doc1_covid19.txt:chunk_00011].

The most common symptoms of COVID-19 include congestion, runny nose, sore throat, dry cough, shortness of breath, loss of taste or smell, fatigue, headaches, fever or chills, and body or muscle aches [doc2_covid19.txt:chunk_00002].
